first.detail: Show a Townsfolk token, then point to two players, one of whom is that character.
Show an Outsider token, then point to two players, one of whom is that character; show zero if no Outsiders are in play.
Show a Minion token, then point to two players, one of whom is that character.
Show the number of pairs of neighboring evil players.
Show the number of their alive evil neighbors.

other.detail: Show the number of their alive evil neighbors.

first.detail: They choose two players. Nod if either registers as a Demon.

other.detail: They choose two players. Nod if either registers as a Demon.

other.action: Wake the Undertaker if a player was executed today.
other.detail: Show the executed player's character token.
They choose another player to protect from the Demon tonight.

other.action: Wake the Ravenkeeper if they died tonight.
other.detail: They choose a player; show that player's character token.

first.detail: They choose a player to be their Master.

other.detail: Remove the previous Master reminder; they choose a new Master.

first.detail: They choose a player to poison through the next day.

other.detail: Remove the previous poison; they choose a player to poison through the next day.

first.detail: Show the Grimoire for as long as needed.

other.detail: Show the Grimoire for as long as needed.

other.action: Wake the Scarlet Woman if they became the Demon today.
other.detail: Show the You Are card, then the Demon token.
They choose a player, who dies. If they choose themself, turn an alive Minion into the Imp and wake that player to show their new character.
